# Confidential Information | WORK INSTRUCTIONS | | | |-----------------------------------------|----------------------|--------------------| | PALLET WRAPPING | | | | Work Instruction No. | | | | 01
WI03
Revision No.
Site Code | 1

OF | Zebra Technologies | ## 1. OVERVIEW This work instruction provides information on how to wrap products on a pallet using the shrink-wrap machine. #### 2. EQUIPMENT INSPECTION - **1.** Before the Shrink Wrap Machine can be turned on, inspect the equipment. - Inspect the power cord and plug for any signs of damage. - Inspect the Control Panel to make sure all control knobs and buttons are attached. - Inspect the turn table for damage (bent, denting, etc.) that may impact a safe operation. - ✓ The "Emergency Stop" button MUST be pushed in, and the Shrink Wrap machine is turned off before equipment inspection. #### 3. PALLET INSPECTION - **1.** Complete a visual inspection of the pallet to ensure it is free of damage and structurally sound. - **2.** Heat-Treated (HT) Pallets are used for any international shipments. - **3.** Plastic pallets are used for Brazil shipments. - **4.** Boxes on the pallet should be free of damage and not exceed 1-inch max overhang of the pallet. - ✓ Reference the *Acceptable and Unacceptable Pallet Job Aid.* - **5.** Heavier boxes should be at the base of the pallet and lighter boxes on top. - ✓ Heavier boxes should never be on top of lighter boxes. - **6.** Boxes containing Dangerous Goods should be properly labeled prior to wrapping. #### 4. SHRINK-WRAP MACHINE

SHRINK-WRAP MACHINE"

Text:
- **1.** Place the pallet on the turn table.
  - ✓ Manual pallet jack must be removed from the machine turn table.
- **2.** Grab the shrink wrap and tie it to the bottom of the pallet.
- **3.** Make sure all the settings on the control panel are set to the specific needs of the pallet you are wrapping and press the **GREEN** start button.
  - ✓ If you notice any discrepancies, push the "Emergency Stop" button, and alert management and/or maintenance.
  - ✓ If you need to replace the shrink wrap, push the "Emergency Stop" button, and replace the shrink wrap.
- **4.** Pallet wrapping is complete when the pallet is completely wrapped, and the turn table has stopped spinning.
- **5.** Remove the pallet off the Shrink Wrap machine turn table and placed it in the staging area.
